goals.name: agree-to-transfer
goals.messages: I’m calling about the repair plan that was set up on your car. {vehicle} Registration number {reg_number:digits}, when you purchased it from {dealership?dealership?\"the dealership\"}. My system shows that your repair plan ends on {expiry_date:words}. Do you want to hear about the options you have to make sure you remain protected from expensive repair bills?

goals.name: wants-a-callback
goals.messages: how about I'll call you at a later time?

goals.name: transfer-to-dealer
goals.messages: Let me transfer you to one of my specialists on the phone to discuss the renewal options, one moment.

new_call.parent_fail_message: I'm sorry, but our team is currently busy. We'll have someone call you back shortly. Thank you!

idle_messages.text: By the way, you planning to have this car for a while right?
Almost there - they'll be able to show you all the available options that fit your budget and preferences.
Thank you for your patience, this will only take another minute.
Again Thank you for your patience, I'm still working to get them on the line

goals.name: hang-up
goals.messages: Thank you for your time, goodbye!

default_metadata.%human_message%: My name is {%agent_name%} from Warranty First, please call me back at {%agent_phone_number%:local_phone:digits}
default_metadata.%responses_reason_for_call%: I am calling about your repair plan that was set up on your {vehicle}  registration number {reg_number:digits} that you purchased {dealership?"at"} {dealership?dealership}.
default_metadata.%responses_company_name%: Warranty First - we provide car repair plans.
default_metadata.%responses_list_source%: You have a repair plan with us that is due to end on {expiry_date:words}.
default_metadata.%voicemail_message%: Hi, this is {%agent_name%} from Warranty First leaving a message for {contact_full_name}, regarding the repair plan on your {vehicle} registration number {reg_number:digits}. Your plan is due to end on {expiry_date:words}. Please return my call on {%agent_phone_number%:local_phone:digits} so that we can discuss your options. Thank you.
